title: XRP Surges 5% as Clarity Act Moves Forward, But Institutional Boom Needs More
summary: XRP prices jumped 5% after a key Senate committee advanced the Clarity Act, which could bring legal clarity for crypto. However, a real institutional boom will require full congressional approval and broader market confidence.
body:
XRP prices surged 5% this week following the Senate Banking Committee's advancement of the Clarity Act, a bill aimed at providing legal clarity for cryptocurrencies. The bill, which seeks to establish clear regulatory frameworks for digital assets, has revitalized hopes that deeper institutional investment could flow into XRP products.

The Clarity Act, if passed, would define the legal status of cryptocurrencies and outline how they should be regulated, potentially removing significant legal uncertainties that have hindered institutional adoption. While the Senate committee's move is a positive step, the bill still needs to pass through the full Senate and House of Representatives before becoming law.

For everyday investors, this development could mean increased liquidity and more investment products tied to XRP, potentially driving up its price. However, the full impact will depend on whether the bill gains enough support in Congress to become law. The crypto market remains volatile, and regulatory clarity is just one piece of the puzzle for sustained growth.

Investors should watch for further legislative progress and any additional regulatory developments that could impact XRP and the broader crypto market. The next critical step will be the full Senate vote, which could set the stage for a more favorable environment for institutional investors.
twitterThread: XRP surged 5% after the Senate Banking Committee advanced the Clarity Act, a bill that could bring legal clarity to crypto. But don't pop the champagne yet—it still needs full congressional approval.

The Clarity Act aims to define how cryptocurrencies should be regulated, potentially removing legal uncertainties that have kept institutional money on the sidelines. Still, passing the full Senate and House is no small feat.

For now, keep an eye on Congress. If the Clarity Act passes, it could open the floodgates for institutional XRP investment. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-05-17-xrp-surges-5-as-clarity-act-moves-forward-but-institutional-boom-needs-more
standaloneTweet: XRP jumped 5% after the Senate Banking Committee advanced the Clarity Act, but a real bull run still needs full congressional approval. Keep an eye on Congress for the next big move.
